sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n12399" key="a)podastu/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀποδασ-τύς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ύος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n12399.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀποδασμός</ref></xr>, Id.</sense> </entryFree>
